overview: Physician-led preventive longevity medicine clinic in Portland, Oregon specializing in hormone replacement therapy, metabolic health, and advanced cardiovascular diagnostics. Led by Dr. Kathryn Retzler with 25+ years of experience, the clinic uses evidence-based approaches to detect disease risk early and optimize long-term health.
highlights: DEXA scans, carotid ultrasound, and Cleerly® coronary CT angiography
GLP-1 weight loss programs with continuous glucose monitoring
targetAudience: Patients seeking evidence-based preventive medicine with a focus on hormone optimization and early disease detection.
